particulars.description: Freehold property - 1A and 1B south street dorchester DT1 1BL - title no: DT242907. Leasehold property - tudor arcade south street - title no: DT265835.

All that freehold and leasehold property known as phase 1 tudor arcade, south street,. Dorchester DT1 1BL (comprising retail units 1, 2, 3, 4-5, 6, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18 tudor arcade), 1A. and 1B south street and 23 and 24 durngate street, dorchester registered at the land registry. With title numbers DT265835 (leasehold) and DT242907 (freehold).

All that freehold and leasehold property known as phase 1 tudor arcade, south street, dorchester DT1 1BL (comprising retail units 1, 2, 3, 4-5, 6, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18 tudor arcade), 1A and 1B south street and 23 and 24 durngate street, dorchester registered at the land registry with title numbers DT265835 (leasehold) and DT242907 (freehold).

1) the freehold property known as 1A and 1B south street, dorchester DT1 1BL and registered at hm land registry under title number DT242907.. 2) that part of tudor arcade, south street, dorchester, dorset as shown tinted blue on the filed plan of title number DT265835 being the land demised by a headlease dated 16 august 1989 made between (1) west dorset district council and (2) bass pensions limited for a term of 127 years from 25 december 1984 and registered at hm land registry under title number DT265835.
